message:
Researcher: paragraph-splitting research for Task #209 ghost narrowing

- Created notes/2026-05-28-paragraph-splitting-research.md
  - Key finding: lua-widow-control proves tex.linebreak() callable from callbacks
  - 3 ranked approaches: (A) Split-and-Re-Linebreak, (B) Pre-Check Needspace, (C) Hybrid
  - Recommended: Approach B as quickest win
- Created Task #211 for Programmer with concrete implementation guidance
- Updated BLACKBOARD.md: new task, comm log entry, updated date
